description_long: This is a modern residential house complex featuring two main structures with flat and gently sloped roofs, surrounded by landscaped greenery and decorative trees. The property includes a large, organically shaped swimming pool with a paved deck area and a circular hot tub adjacent to it. The front of the house is marked by a wide driveway leading to two garages, with a central walkway flanked by manicured lawns and ornamental shrubs. The buildings have large windows, clean geometric lines, and a minimalist aesthetic, emphasizing open space and natural light. The backyard is designed for leisure, with the pool area serving as the focal point and additional green space for outdoor activities. The overall layout is symmetrical and well-organized, blending contemporary architecture with functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, symmetrical house complex with two main buildings, a large swimming pool, landscaped gardens, and a wide driveway. The design features flat roofs, large windows, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garages, main entryways, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, the pool area, and the rear garden.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, hot tub, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, side of the house, and driveway extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide central walkway with double doors, minimal steps, no porch, and clean geometric lines
